overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a rainy night walk through Night City's corporate district. The player navigates through a plaza with a large illuminated monument, crosses busy intersections with pedestrians carrying umbrellas, and passes towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza with central illuminated monument

events.description: approaching the large illuminated monument with FF:06:B5 markings
turning right to navigate around the monument base

agents.ego_description: walking through the rain-soaked corporate plaza toward the glowing monument, passing benches and planters

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella walking away from camera toward the monument

entered.detail: large futuristic monument with glowing yellow lights and FF:06:B5 text projection
tall dark glass building with illuminated windows
tall curved glass facade with vertical lighting strips
blue holographic advertisement figure floating near building entrance
modern concrete benches arranged around the plaza perimeter

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rain-slicked corporate plaza surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers. The camera approaches a massive illuminated monument glowing with yellow light, passing modern benches and sparse pedestrian traffic. Blue holographic advertisements float near building entrances as the rain creates reflective pools on the concrete pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with digital advertising pillars

events.description: passing the monument and entering the main sidewalk area with advertising displays
approaching intersection crosswalk with increasing pedestrian traffic

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past digital advertising pillars, approaching a busy intersection

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians with umbrellas waiting at the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall vertical digital screen displaying advertisements with 2067 text
illuminated NIGHT CITY sign above building entrance
yellow zebra crossing lines visible ahead on the wet street

segments.scene_description: Having passed the monument, the scene transitions to a city sidewalk lined with tall digital advertising pillars. The camera moves past vertical screens displaying futuristic ads while approaching a crosswalk. Pedestrians with umbrellas gather at the intersection ahead, and the iconic NIGHT CITY sign becomes visible above a building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with holographic displays

events.description: stepping onto the crosswalk and beginning to cross the street with the crowd
navigating through dense crowd of pedestrians with umbrellas while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection amidst a dense crowd of pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas, avoiding other walkers

notable_agents.action: futuristic car waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross
child running ahead of the group across the crosswalk

entered.detail: massive horizontal digital billboard displaying advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a busy intersection crosswalk filled with pedestrians carrying umbrellas that reflect the neon lights. Crossing the yellow-striped asphalt, the player navigates through the dense crowd while futuristic cars wait at the edges. Large digital billboards and the blue hologram dominate the visual field as the rain intensifies the reflective glow of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: secondary intersection with heavy pedestrian traffic

events.description: reaching the opposite curb and continuing across secondary crosswalk
turning slightly left to follow the pedestrian flow down the street

agents.ego_description: continuing across the second intersection, following pedestrians with umbrellas into the darker section of the street

notable_agents.action: woman with red hair and black coat walking past the camera

entered.detail: dark industrial-style building facade with minimal lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through a secondary intersection with persistent heavy rain and neon reflections. The camera passes a distinctive pedestrian with red hair while navigating the crosswalk. The environment transitions to a darker section of the street with less illuminated facades, maintaining the dense urban atmosphere of Night City.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked corporate plaza that gradually transitions into a bustling city intersection. It begins by gliding across reflective concrete pavements toward a massive, yellow-glowing monument framed by towering glass skyscrapers and floating blue holograms. As the camera passes the monument, the open plaza shifts into a narrower sidewalk lined with towering digital advertising pillars. The scene then moves past these vertical screens toward a crowded crosswalk where pedestrians gather under umbrellas, before finally revealing the iconic Night City sign mounted above a nearby building entrance.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a rain-slicked corporate district that shifts from a brightly lit, holographic plaza into a darker, more shadowed urban corridor. It begins by entering a busy intersection crosswalk, navigating through a dense crowd of pedestrians with umbrellas that mirror the vibrant neon glow of the surrounding city. As the camera crosses the yellow-striped asphalt, the visual field is dominated by towering digital billboards and a massive blue hologram while futuristic cars idle at the edges. The scene then transitions through a secondary intersection under intensifying rain, passing a distinctive red-haired pedestrian amidst the persistent reflections. Finally, the movement leads into a dimmer section of the street where the brilliant lights fade into less illuminated facades, deepening the moody atmosphere of the city.
